design_philosophy: A hyper-modern, professional, elite AI consulting landing page. High contrast, sharp edges mixed with subtle glowing elements. The chat interface is the focal point, acting as the primary discovery mechanism.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and increased border opacity
motion_and_interactions.chat_reveal: staggered fade-up for each chat message
motion_and_interactions.background: slow, continuous subtle movement using framer-motion or particle effects

surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Neumorphism mix: solid white background, black text, with a subtle white glow on hover
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Flat solid: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-white focus:outline-none transition-colors rounded-none

components_strategy.chat_interface: Custom UI. Use framer-motion for message bubbles. Left side for AI, right side for user. Implement a fake typing indicator.
components_strategy.pricing_cards: Bento grid mode. One dominant card, one secondary. Use 'Tracing Beam' border effect on the recommended tier.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Button. Override default styles to match the dark high-contrast theme.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react with thin stroke widths (1.5) to match the Outfit font.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React application using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.
The hero section MUST be an interactive AI chat simulation asking questions about the user's business and pain points, mimicking a 21st.dev style component.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'. Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts.
Use dark mode exclusively. Background color is #050505.
Implement the animated background using either pure CSS animations, Framer Motion floating elements, or the provided background image with a slow pan/zoom effect.
Ensure the header nav has a backdrop blur and a 1px border on the bottom (border-white/10).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., chat inputs, send buttons).
Use Shadcn UI for standard form controls in the 'Contact' section of the chat.
Follow the 'Bento Grid' strategy for any feature showcases below the fold, avoiding standard bootstrap columns.
